Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: ConditionCategoryCodes
Title: Condition Category Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

Name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
Title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

Name: Condition/DiagnosisSeverity
Title: Condition/Diagnosis Severity
Description: Preferred value set for Condition/Diagnosis severity grading.

Name: ConditionStage
Title: Condition Stage
Description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

Name: ConditionStageType
Title: Condition Stage Type
Description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

Name: ConditionVerificationStatus
Title: ConditionVerificationStatus
Description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes
Title: Manifestation and Symptom Codes
Description: Example value set for Manifestation and Symptom codes.

Name: USCoreConditionCodes
Title: US Core Condition Codes
Description: This describes the problem. Diagnosis/Problem List is broadly defined as a series of brief statements that catalog a patient's medical, nursing, dental, social, preventative and psychiatric events and issues that are relevant to that patient's healthcare (e.g., signs, symptoms, and defined conditions). ICD-10 is appropriate for Diagnosis information, and ICD-9 for historical information.

Name: USCoreProblemOrHealthConcern
Title: US Core Problem or Health Concern
Description: Code set for category codes for *US Core Condition Problems and Health Concerns Profile* consisting of the concepts "problem" and "health-concern".

Name: USCoreScreeningAssessmentConditionCategory
Title: US Core Screening Assessment Condition Category
Description: Category codes used in the US Core Condition Screening Assessment Profile to help identify the type of USCDI Health Status/Assessment data class being reported.

Name: ACCESSAlignmentResultVS
Title: ACCESS Alignment Result Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Alignment Result code system.

Name: ACCESSBHDiagnosisVS
Title: ACCESS Behavioral Health (BH) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
Description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Behavioral Health (BH) track. Includes depression and anxiety disorder diagnoses.

Name: ACCESSCKMDiagnosisVS
Title: ACCESS Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (CKM) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
Description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (CKM) track. Includes diabetes mellitus (all types), atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD), and chronic kidney disease (CKD stage 3) diagnoses.

Name: ACCESSEligibilityResultVS
Title: ACCESS Eligibility Result Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Eligibility Result code system.

Name: ACCESSEventTypeVS
Title: ACCESS Event Types Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Event Types code system.

Name: ACCESSMSKDiagnosisVS
Title: ACCESS Musculoskeletal (MSK) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
Description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Musculoskeletal (MSK) track. Includes osteoarthritis, other arthropathies and joint disorders, spine and structural disorders, degenerative spine disease, back pain and radiculopathy, soft tissue/tendon/bursa disorders, and peripheral nerve and plexus disorders.

Name: ACCESSReferralTypeVS
Title: ACCESS Referral Type Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Referral Type code system.

Name: ACCESSTrackVS
Title: ACCESS Model Tracks Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Model Tracks code system.

Name: ACCESSUnalignmentReasonVS
Title: ACCESS Unalignment Reason Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Unalignment Reason code system.

Name: ACCESSUnalignmentResultVS
Title: ACCESS Unalignment Result Value Set
Description: This value set includes all codes from the ACCESS Unalignment Result code system.

Name: ACCESSeCKMDiagnosisVS
Title: ACCESS Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (eCKM) Track Qualifying Diagnoses
Description: This value set contains ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes that qualify a patient for the ACCESS Model Early Cardio-Kidney-Metabolic (eCKM) track. Includes hypertension, dyslipidemia, prediabetes, and obesity diagnoses.
